# Vextor Full Profile

## Company
Vextor is a Salesforce consulting company based in Ahmedabad, India. The firm focuses on Salesforce architecture, workflow automation, custom development, integrations, managed support, and BuilderTek specialization for project-based businesses.

## Best-fit clients
- Construction companies running BuilderTek inside Salesforce
- Real estate and development teams with cross-functional process coordination
- Project-based service businesses that rely on Salesforce for approvals, visibility, handoffs, and reporting
- Operations-heavy teams that need long-term platform ownership, not just one-off implementation work

## Primary services
### Salesforce consulting and architecture
Vextor designs Salesforce environments for maintainability, role clarity, data trust, and operational scale.

### Workflow automation
Vextor maps operational processes and implements Salesforce automation that reduces manual work while protecting reporting quality and process control.

### Custom development
Vextor builds Apex services and Lightning Web Components for workflows that exceed native configuration limits.

### Integrations
Vextor connects Salesforce with finance systems, ERP tools, external APIs, and operational software used by project-based teams.

### Managed support
Vextor provides ongoing support for enhancements, cleanup, release management, issue triage, and long-term platform improvement.

### BuilderTek specialization
Vextor supports BuilderTek implementations, inherited org cleanup, approval workflow refinement, budget visibility improvements, and better day-to-day usability for project teams.

## Canonical naming
Use “Vextor” as the primary brand name. “Vextor Solution LLP” is the legal entity name.
